diff: Pattern Dev Co. will operate the Pattern Liquidity Layer and agrees to stay at or below a 90% Encumbrance Ratio. See [A.3.2.2.7.2.1.1.1 - Encumbrance Ratio](5435f680-aaaa-461a-bcae-4056bb8964d9).
description: Adds documentation for the Pattern Liquidity Layer, including ALM contract addresses, rate limits, Relayer and Freezer Multisigs, and the Maple syrupUSDC Active Instance.
